revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Third Philippine Republic]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = History of the Philippines (1946–1965) | shortname alias = Philippines | flag alias = Flag of the Philippines (1946-1998).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Philippines | related2 = Philippine Commonwealth | related3 = Second Philippine Republic | related4 = First Philippine Republic | related5 = Fourth Philippine Republic | cat = Philippines, Third Republic </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Third_Philippine_Republic here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Third_Philippine_Republic for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = History of the Philippines (1946–1965) | shortname alias = Philippines | flag alias = Flag of the Philippines (1946-1998).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Philippines | related2 = Philippine Commonwealth | related3 = Second Philippine Republic | related4 = First Philippine Republic | related5 = Fourth Philippine Republic | cat = Philippines, Third Republic </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
